title: Retries, Idempotency, Compensation, and Recovery · Fault-Injection Lab
summary: Harden a loop that calls unreliable external services. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a fault-injected recovery harness with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use bounded retries with backoff and error classification.
Design idempotent operations and deduplication for repeated requests.
Checkpoint durable state so a process can restart without replaying completed effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
